deliverable: Original square logo mark for an agent-native image workflow project named VibeCanvas
purpose: Repository avatar, favicon, app icon, and documentation header
subject: A single abstract symbol combining a rounded canvas frame with one flowing ribbon or brush path, suggesting generation, editing, and revision without using a literal robot
composition: Centered symbol, strong figure-ground separation, generous safe margin, readable at 32 pixels, no mockup surface
style: Simple geometric mark with warm humanistic technology character, clean vector-like edges, distinctive and easy to redraw
palette: Two or three colors maximum: warm clay, fog blue, and charcoal on an opaque off-white background
constraints: no gradients that disappear at small size
no tiny details, letters, watermark, stationery mockup, 3D room, or unrelated emblem
original design only; do not imitate an existing logo
